about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Born in Batumi, Built for the World

about.heading: Born in Batumi, Built for the World
about.intro1: Silk Beauty Salon was founded with one vision: to bring world-class aesthetic medicine and luxury beauty services to the heart of Batumi, Georgia.
about.intro2: Our team of internationally certified specialists — trained across Europe, the Middle East, and beyond — believes that beauty is not a luxury. It's a form of self-expression, and everyone deserves the best.
about.value1Desc: All aesthetic treatments performed by certified medical specialists using EU-approved products.
about.value2Desc: Every appointment is tailored to your unique features, goals, and skin type. We never rush.
about.value3Desc: Our team trained in Paris, Istanbul, Milan, and Tel Aviv. Global expertise, Batumi roots.
about.value4Desc: We use cruelty-free, dermatologically tested products. No compromises on quality.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about visiting us

safety.question: Are your products and procedures safe?
safety.answer: Yes, we use only EU-certified and FDA-approved products. All procedures are performed by licensed medical professionals.

advance.question: How far in advance should I book?
advance.answer: We recommend booking 2-3 weeks in advance for international patients to allow time for treatment planning and travel coordination.

combine.question: Can I combine multiple treatments in one visit?
combine.answer: Absolutely! Many patients plan a 'beauty week' with multiple treatments. We help you schedule them safely with proper recovery time.

language.question: Do you speak English?
language.answer: Yes, our staff speaks English, Russian, Georgian, and Turkish. We also provide translation services if needed.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept cash (GEL, USD, EUR), credit cards, and bank transfers. Payment plans are available for larger treatment packages.

refund.question: What is your cancellation policy?
refund.answer: We offer full refunds for cancellations made 48 hours in advance. For last-minute changes, we can reschedule your appointment.
